IS_ACTIVE 

LABEL: Active Practice (Y) or Inactive Practice (N) 

DESCRIPTION: Active practice or inactive practice. 

SHORT NAME: IS_ACTIVE 

LONG NAME: IS_ACTIVE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Practice 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Y = Yes (active practice) 
N = No (inactive practice) 

COMMENT: —
